emails.subject: Re: Star Supply
emails.body: I have complete faith in you! By the way, the guy from Star already called with corrections to their company name, it's Starsupply Petroleum Inc. He said he passed the agreement on to his legal and he would be getting us comments back on Monday. Daniel Diamond 03/30/2001 04:22 PM
